# PlayerClassDefinition.PrimaryAttribute property

The core attribute that grants this class its Skill Damage — the class's primary stat (Warlock Willpower, Rogue Dexterity, Necromancer/Sorcerer Intelligence, Barbarian/Paladin Strength, …). `null` for a malformed/placeholder record (e.g. `Axe Bad Data`).

```csharp
public CoreStat? PrimaryAttribute { get; }
```
